synopsis: AI has made online scams, impersonation, and data harvesting dramatically more sophisticated â and most of the advice you've heard is already outdated. This course walks you through the real threats targeting people your age and gives you concrete steps to protect yourself, your identity, and your accounts.
rationale: Young adults are among the most targeted demographics for AI-powered scams and data exploitation, yet cybersecurity education rarely addresses the specific, AI-amplified risks they face in their daily digital lives.
learning_outcome: Learners can identify AI-powered threats like deepfake scams and intelligent phishing, complete a personal security audit, and put in place a practical set of defenses for their accounts and online presence.
